title: Semantic Property Enrichment for Circularity Assessments Using BIM and Labeled Property Graphs
task: BIM模型循环性评估语义富化
taskEn: Semantic property enrichment for BIM-based circularity assessments
inputData: BIM/IFC模型数据与建筑构件原型数据库
inputDataEn: BIM/IFC model data and element archetype database
abstract: Integrating circularity assessments into early-stage building design supports informed decisions that advance a circular economy by evaluating, among other aspects, how easily building components can be separated and reused without damage. This study investigates how building information models (BIM) can be semantically enriched to automatically calculate disassembly potential and the building circularity indicator (BCI), two types of circularity assessment. The study presents a method combining semantic textual similarity (STS), matching of IFC elements to archetypal elements using fine-tuned large language models (LLM), with labeled property graphs (LPG). The IFC models are enriched with disassembly knowledge of the matched archetypes, encoding connection types, accessibility, and assembly logic. Across three architectural-model case studies and two LLMs, the fully automated pipeline yielded BCI values within <1.5% of manual benchmarks, but the low archetype-matching accuracy necessitated manual verification. Four competency questions validate the circularity graph, and manual recomputation of BCI confirms the calculation consistency. This approach contributes to reducing manual modeling effort and supports architects and engineers in evaluating design for disassembly principles during the early design phase. The work lays a foundation for future design decision-making, enabling circular building designs by combining AI- and graph-based reasoning systems.
pdfFile: Forth and De Wolf - 2026 - Semantic property enrichment for circularity assessments using BIM and labeled property graphs
markdownFile: Forth and De Wolf - 2026 - Semantic property enrichment for circularity assessments using BIM and labeled property graphs
contribution: 提出结合微调LLM语义相似度匹配与标记属性图(LPG)的BIM语义富化方法，实现建筑构件拆卸潜力和建筑循环性指标(BCI)的自动计算；三个案例、两种LLM的BCI总体偏差平均2.2%，微调模型平均1.5%
methodology: 构建包含四个步骤的工作流：(1)使用微调LLM通过语义文本相似度(STS)将IFC元素与建筑构件原型数据库匹配；(2)将IFC模型和原型数据转换为标记属性图并融合为统一循环性图；(3)富化连接类型、可达性和装配逻辑等拆卸相关属性；(4)基于循环性图计算构件级拆卸潜力和建筑级BCI指标
results: 三个案例、两种LLM下，自动匹配所得BCI相对人工基准的偏差均低于4%，总体平均2.2%；微调IfcMaterial2MP平均偏差1.5%，预训练text-embedding-3-small平均2.9%；但元素匹配准确率低于70%，建议采用半自动化工作流进行人工验证；开发了交互式IFC-循环性图查看器
